findings.description: `getRequestScopedVar` is missing from s1 hints. This is a key API method used repeatedly across all sub-examples (multiple SqlResultSet, entity/form, SqlRow cases) to retrieve values from request scope.

Source has 7 distinct headings at the split level but the knowledge file has only 5 sections. Two separate source sections are merged into s4: 「テスト結果確認（目視）」(underlined with dashes) and 「HTMLダンプ出力結果」(underlined with equals, anchored as `html_dump_dir`). While the content is preserved, these are separate top-level sections in the source with distinct anchors.
findings.source_evidence: Source headings at split level: 固有の処理を追加する場合 / ダウンロードファイルのテスト / テスト起動方法 / テスト結果確認（目視）/ HTMLダンプ出力結果 / リクエスト単体テストクラス作成時の注意点 / (ThreadContext and transaction sub-sections). Knowledge file maps these to s1–s5 (5 sections).
